cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Bob ends up with after all these swaps. Let me start by keeping track of each person's present after each swap. Initially, the presents are: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: white First swap: Bob and Eve swap. So Bob gives his orange ball to Eve, and Eve gives her white present to Bob. Now: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange ball Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob
